files.baseContent:
on: [push]
permissions:
  contents: read
jobs:
  release:
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
files.headContent:
on:
  pull_request_target:
permissions:
  contents: write
jobs:
  release:
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          ref: ${{ github.event.pull_request.head.sha }}
